headline: Healthpeak & Janus Living Announce Launch of Janus Living IPO
summary: DOC launches Janus Living IPO of 37M shares at $18-$20, retaining ~85% stake post-IPO offering in its senior housing REIT spinoff.

headline: Passive Income Investors Love These 5 Quality High-Yield Dividend Stocks Under $20
summary: Most dividend investors seek solid passive income streams from quality dividend stocks. Passive income is a steady stream of unearned income that doesn’t require active traditional work. Shared ideas for earning passive income include investments such as dividend stocks, bonds, and mutual funds, as well as real estate and additional income-producing side hustles. The more ... Passive Income Investors Love These 5 Quality High-Yield Dividend Stocks Under $20
